zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Vernon於1335年出生在英國英格蘭爾希布盧可時，他的父親Richard de Vernon19歲，母親Beatrice de Molynuex16歲。他和Elena Duckinfield至少有5個兒子。他去世於1404年在英國英格蘭爾享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Vernon was born in 1335, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Vernon, was 19 and his mother, Beatrice de Molynuex, was 16. He had at least 5 sons with Elena Duckinfield. He died in 1404, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Vernon est né en 1335, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Vernon, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Molynuex, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Elena Duckinfield. Il est décédé en 1404, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Vernon 1335 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Vernon 19 und seine Mutter Beatrice de Molynuex 16. Er hatte mit Elena Duckinfield mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1404 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Vernon è nato il nel 1335 nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard de Vernon, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice de Molynuex, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Elena Duckinfield. Morì nel 1404, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Vernon(이)가 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 시브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Vernon(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Molynuex(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Elena Duckinfield(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Vernon родился в 1335 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Vernon было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Molynuex, 16. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Elena Duckinfield. Он умер в 1404 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Vernon nació en 1335, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Vernon, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Beatrice de Molynuex, tenía 16 años.
